name: Agualogic water filter
description: A ceramic pot filter developed in Colombia for use in the household.

taxonomy.sub_category: Agualogic water filter Updated on December 7, 2023 · Created on November 17, 2019 Agualogic water filter Open-source A ceramic pot filter developed in Colombia for use in the household. Developed By Agualogic Tested By Environmental Engineering Laboratory, Universidad Nacional, Colombia Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Open-source Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Agualogic filters are silver-enhanced ceramic filters that are designed and distributed by Agualogic , a Colombian-based business that is committed to offering solutions for water purification in rural and urban areas. This product eliminates sediments, bacteria and parasites producing drinkable water with a flow rate of 1.5 – 2.0 liters per hour. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $83.40 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Filters are directly distributed by Agualogic throught its multiple channels for customer service. It also has 60 distributers nation-wide in main cities of Colombia. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Ekofil filter , EcoFiltro , Stéfani Filtro Flex , and Arcifiltro . Countries Colombia, Panama, Venezuela Manufacturing/Building Method Agualogic filters are designed and manufactured by Agualogic, a colombian-based company. Units are manufactured in 3 facilities located in Ocaña, Silvania and Pasto. Agualogic uses local materials and allies with artesanal families which fabricate ceramic pots to whom the ceramix pot mix is provided for this. oduction capacity ranges around 4,000 units per month. <sup>Interview with representative</sup> Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Agualogic has various channels for customer service. Filters can be requested through the Agualogic webpage, facebook and instagram or directly contacting Agualogic by phone or at their headquarters in Bogotá, Colombia. Agualogic also has 60 distributers in main cities of the country. <sup>Interview with representative</sup> Distributions to Date Status More than 2,900 Agualogic filters have been distributed throghout Colombia since its commercialization in December 2018. <sup>Interview with representative</sup> Type of filter Household use Primary material of construction Filtering unit contiains clay, activated carbon and colloidal silver. Outside container is made of high density polietylene plastic or carbon steel coated with a color glass. Additives Colloidal silver and activated carbon Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 1.5 – 2.5 L Bacteria reduction Unknown Virus reduction Unknown Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Maintenance schedule Unknown Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) 44,800 L Safe water storage integration 20 L Design Specifications Agualogic filters are composed of a ceramic filtering unit (made of clay, activated carbon and colloidal silver) that hangs inside a container equipped with a top and a spigot for the filtered water. In the filtering unit the clay traps sediments, bacteria and parasites. Activated carbon eliminates chlorine, color, smell and taste from water. And Coloidal silver eliminates coliforms, parasites and bacteria present in water, including E. Coli. This unit has a processing capacity of 8 liters, with a filtration rate of 1.5 – 2.5 liters per hour. Approximate dimensions are: 320 mm diameter, 300 mm high and 187 mm base. The outside container has a capacity of 20 liters and can be made of plastic or enamelware. The plastic container is made of high density virgin polietylene with approximate dimention: 445 mm high and 330 mm in diameter. The enamelware outside container is made of carbon steel coated with a color glass cover and comes in different colors. Aproximate dimentions are 420 mm hight and 325 mm diameter. Product Schematics Technical Support Technical support for sales, maintenance and repairs is provided throught the different channels Agualogc has for customer service including agualogic’s webpage, call center, headquarters, facebook, instagram and the various distributers it has nation-wide. <sup>Interview with representative</sup> Replacement Components The filtering unit must be replaced every 2 years. Other replacements available are stainless steel and plastic spigots. Lifecycle The lifetime of an Agualogic filtering unit is 2 years; The outside case can last up to 30-40 years if well maintained. The filtering unit comes with a 1-year warranty against damages during transportation. User has 72 hours to report any damage after receiving the filter. <sup>Interview with representative</sup> Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Agualogic filters are designed to eliminate sediments, bacteria and parasites. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety Unknown Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References Agualogic . (n.d.).
